zh.lifeSummary: Agnes是Hugh Hugues de Braine的女兒，於1075年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。她和André de Baudemont至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1137年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈帕格享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes是Hugh Hugues de Braine的女儿，于1075年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。她和André de Baudemont至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1137年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈帕格享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born in 1075, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France as the daughter of Hugh Hugues de Braine. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with André de Baudemont. She died in 1137, in Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes est née en 1075, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, fille de Hugh Hugues de Braine. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec André de Baudemont. Elle est décédée en 1137, à Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes wurde 1075 in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Hugh Hugues de Braine geboren. Sie hatte mit André de Baudemont mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1137 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes è nata il nel 1075 nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia come figlia di Hugh Hugues de Braine. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con André de Baudemont. Morì nel 1137, nel Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnesは1075年にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインでHugh Hugues de Braineの娘として生まれた。彼女はAndré de Baudemontとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1137年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャンプアグンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 1075년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 Hugh Hugues de Braine의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 André de Baudemont(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 챔파그니에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes nasceu em 1075, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França filha de Hugh Hugues de Braine. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com André de Baudemont. Ela faleceu em 1137, em Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes родилась в 1075 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция. Её отца звали Hugh Hugues de Braine. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от André de Baudemont. Она умерла в 1137 г. в местности чампагн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes nació en 1075, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia como hija de Hugh Hugues de Braine. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con André de Baudemont. Murió en 1137, en Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
